# Creator Armour

> Professional infrastructure for Indian creators to close brand deals, manage contracts, and track revenue.

Creator Armour is a high-performance platform designed to replace messy Instagram DMs with structured professional workflows. It provides creators with a dedicated collaboration link where brands can view packages, check rates, and submit formal offers.

## Core Services

- **Creator Collab Link**: A professional storefront for creators to list services and receive offers.
- **Structured Offers**: Standardized deal formats that eliminate ambiguity in deliverables and timelines.
- **Contract Management**: Automated generation and tracking of collaboration agreements.
- **Revenue Tracking**: Dashboards for monitoring paid, pending, and overdue brand payments.
- **Legal Support**: On-demand legal aid for payment recovery and contract disputes.

## Key Resources

- [Home](https://creatorarmour.com/)
- [Blog / Creator Guides](https://creatorarmour.com/blog)
- [Influencer Rate Calculator](https://creatorarmour.com/rate-calculator)
- [Free Contract Templates](https://creatorarmour.com/free-influencer-contract)
- [Legal Health Check](https://creatorarmour.com/free-legal-check)
- [Brand Directory](https://creatorarmour.com/brand-directory)
- [Discover Creators](https://creatorarmour.com/discover)

## Technical Integration

- **Primary URL**: https://creatorarmour.com
- **API Endpoint**: https://creatorarmour.com/api (Internal use only)
- **Sitemap**: https://creatorarmour.com/sitemap.xml

## Business Context

Creator Armour targets the Indian creator economy, focusing on the "middle-class" of creators who need professional tools but aren't yet represented by agencies. It operates as a business-in-a-box for independent influencers.
